description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:carbon Docker image and defines a global before_script executing `which node`, `node -v`, `npm -v`, and `npm install`. Add a single stage named deploy and a job called deploy that runs in this stage. The deploy job has its own before_script which installs `openssh-client` if `ssh-agent` is missing, creates `~/.ssh`, starts the ssh-agent, and writes a config disabling StrictHostKeyChecking when running inside Docker. It is limited to the master branch via `only: - master` and its script adds the private key from the $PRIVATE_KEY variable with `ssh-add <(echo "$PRIVATE_KEY")`, copies the repository contents to `deploy@vaslyn.epi.codes:/srv/vaslyn.epi.codes/spotify-lyrics/` using `scp -P22 -r *`, then SSHs to the server to source nvm, run `npm install`, and restart the app with `pm2 restart spotify-lyrics`. No caches, artifacts, services, or additional variables are defined.
